hero.title: Accessibility mamawhna aṭangin public repo thlengin
hero.lead: IATF chuan pawlte, pâwlte leh mimal tinte chu mipuite tâna open source project-a an mamawh tak takte siam tûrin a ṭanpui a ni.
support: Project pawmte chu IATF GitHub organization-ah copyleft license hnuaiah tihchhuah an ni a, engineer mawhphurhna neite'n an siam chhuak a ni.

header.title: Accessible software-a mipuite hmuh theihna kawng awlsam tak

paragraphs: Form hmangin, tu pawhin IATF-ah accessibility problem an thehlut thei a. Team-in an buaipui thei a nih chuan, hnathawhna atana public GitHub repository hawn a ni ang.
Project pawm apiangte chuan code, issue, documentation, leh release-te tân public home chiang tak an nei a, engineer mawhphurhna neitute kaihhruaina hnuaiah development an nei bawk a ni.

header.title: A hnathawh dân
header.intro: Model chu a tlêm hle a, chumi avâng chuan mipui kalna kawng chu zawh a awlsam a ni.

steps.title: mamawhna a thlen
paragraphs: Association emaw, pawl emaw, mimal emaw chuan Accessibility mamawh tak tak avânga dilna an thehlût thei a ni.
Dilna chu website kaltlangin emaw, contact@iatf.cc, a nih loh leh Discord kaltlangin.

steps.title: IATF-in a enfiah
paragraphs: Mission fitna te, practical scope te, leh hnathawh hi open source project-a dah a nih leh nih loh te kan enfiah a.

steps.title: Public repository siam a ni
paragraphs: Project pawm a nih chuan, IATF GitHub organization-ah copyleft license hnuaiah chhuah a ni ang.
Repository-ah hian code, issue, documentation, leh release-te a awm a.

steps.title: Engineer mawhphurhna nei chuan he project hi a kaihruai a ni
paragraphs: Project repository-ah chuan engineer mawhphurtu ruat a ni a, development chu mipui hmuh theihin a awm a ni.

header.title: Hnathawh mek enfiah emaw, project tak tak ṭan emaw

paragraphs: Register-ah hian mipui hriat theih thil awm tawh zawng zawng en theih a ni a, a nih loh leh project-a tangkai theih lohna harsatna a awm chuan inthah ṭan mai tur a ni.
